rewritten_requirements: The system shall activate a campaign once a manager and staff are assigned, it is approved, and the contract is signed.
The system shall allow surveys to be carried out and evaluated during the campaign.
The system shall prepare, approve, schedule, and run adverts during the campaign.
The system shall allow adjustments to the campaign, such as extending its duration or changing the budget.
The system shall pause a campaign, stopping all adverts, and allow resuming to continue work.
The system shall calculate costs and prepare a final statement if the campaign is cancelled.
The system shall complete the campaign and prepare a final statement when all work is finished.
The system shall handle payment after completion; if the amount does not match what is due, it may make adjustments such as refunds.
The system shall mark a campaign as paid once the correct payment is settled.
The system shall archive the campaign and release all assigned staff and managers after completion.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A campaign becomes active after a manager and staff are assigned, it is approved, and the contract is signed.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A campaign begins after a manager and staff are assigned. Once it is approved and the contract is signed, the campaign becomes active.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Surveys can be carried out and evaluated during the campaign.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: During the campaign, two kinds of activities happen. On one side, surveys may be carried out and evaluated.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Adverts are prepared, approved, scheduled, and then run during the campaign.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: On the other side, adverts are prepared, approved, scheduled, and then run.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The campaign can be adjusted if needed, such as extending it or changing the budget.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The campaign can also be adjusted if needed, such as extending it or changing the budget.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The campaign can be paused at any point, which stops all adverts, and later resumed to continue work.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: At any point, the campaign can be paused, which stops all adverts, and later resumed to continue work.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the campaign is cancelled, the system calculates the costs and prepares a final statement.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the campaign is cancelled, the system calculates the costs and prepares a final statement.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When all work is finished, the campaign is completed and a final statement is prepared.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Otherwise, when all work is finished, the campaign is completed and a final statement is prepared.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After completion, payment is handled. If the amount does not match what is due, adjustments like refunds may be made.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After completion, payment is handled. If the amount does not match what is due, adjustments like refunds may be made.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Once the correct payment is settled, the campaign is marked as paid.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the correct payment is settled, the campaign is marked as paid.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The campaign is archived and all assigned staff and managers are released after completion.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Finally, the campaign is archived and all assigned staff and managers are released.
